findings.summary: Repeated unsafe casts between GeneratedImageWithMetadata and GenerationRow types across 4+ production files
findings.suggestion: Unify GenerationRow and GeneratedImageWithMetadata into a single canonical type or make variantToGenerationRow return GenerationRow directly instead of Record<string, unknown>.
evidence: variantToGenerationRow returns Record<string, unknown> then callers cast 'as unknown as GenerationRow' in 5+ files

findings.summary: Extensive use of 'as Record<string, unknown>' and 'as string' casts to access nested JSON params from database records
findings.suggestion: Create typed interfaces for common nested param structures. individualTravelSegment.ts alone has 40+ primitive casts. A typed TravelSegmentOriginalParams interface would eliminate most.
evidence: individualTravelSegment.ts lines 208-413: ~40 'as number|string|boolean' casts on UnknownRecord properties
galleryUtils.ts lines 38-54: all param access through Record<string, unknown> followed by primitive casts

findings.summary: RealtimeEventProcessor uses 6 'as unknown as' casts on e.new/e.old from Supabase realtime events with no runtime validation
findings.suggestion: Add a runtime validation helper that checks required fields exist before casting to catch schema drift early.
evidence: Lines 174, 195, 248, 271, 344, 388: 'e.new as unknown as TypeRecord' pattern with no runtime validation

findings.summary: PostgrestFilterBuilder uses <any, any, any, any, any> generic params in useProjectGenerations
findings.suggestion: Type the first generic as Database['public'] to get table-level type checking on query builder operations.
evidence: Line 43: type AnyPostgrestFilterBuilder = PostgrestFilterBuilder<any, any, any, any, any>

findings.summary: task_id cast bypasses type system to insert nullable value into non-nullable typed column
findings.suggestion: Regenerate Supabase types after confirming task_id is nullable in schema, as the TODO comment says.
evidence: Line 324: task_id: (taskId || null) as unknown as string

findings.summary: generateVideoService builds requestBody as a loose object then casts to TravelBetweenImagesTaskParams
findings.suggestion: Build the requestBody using TravelBetweenImagesTaskParams type from the start to catch missing fields at compile time.
evidence: Line 645: createTravelBetweenImagesTask(requestBody as unknown as TravelBetweenImagesTaskParams)
Line 114: const videoRecord = firstVideo as unknown as Record<string, unknown>

findings.summary: useReferences casts GenerationRow to access 'url' field that exists at runtime but not in type
findings.suggestion: Add 'url' as an optional field to GenerationRow interface.
evidence: Line 42: const mediaWithUrl = media as unknown as { url?: string | null }

findings.summary: phaseConfig casts through toRecord() then 'as unknown as SegmentSettings["phaseConfig"]' without validation
findings.suggestion: Create a parsePhaseConfig helper that validates the shape and returns SegmentSettings['phaseConfig'] | undefined.
evidence: Line 146 and 215: phaseConfig double-cast through toRecord() then as unknown as SegmentSettings['phaseConfig']

findings.summary: filter(Boolean) followed by 'as unknown as Preset[]' erases null/undefined without proper narrowing
findings.suggestion: Replace with typed filter: '.filter((p): p is NonNullable<typeof p> => p != null)'
evidence: Line 43: .filter(Boolean) as unknown as Preset[]

findings.summary: SelectedPresetCard casts full Supabase resources row to narrow type without validation
findings.suggestion: Create a transformResourceToPreset function that extracts and validates needed fields.
evidence: Line 39: return data as unknown as { id: string; metadata: PresetMetadata }

findings.summary: useUserUIState casts Supabase query result and generic value through 'as unknown as'
findings.suggestion: Define a proper return type for the settings query. Use a type guard for generationMethods normalization.
evidence: Line 89: const typedResult = result as unknown as CachedSettingsResult
Line 137: const valObj = val as unknown as Record<string, unknown>

findings.summary: usePersistentToolState casts between generic T and Record<string, unknown> in multiple places
findings.suggestion: Add constraint 'T extends Record<string, unknown>' to eliminate casting.
evidence: Line 151: defaults: resolvedDefaults as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
Lines 157-158: autoSave.settings and updateFields cast to Partial<T>

findings.summary: createSupabaseClient patches internal .rest.fetch through 'as unknown as' cast
findings.suggestion: Add comment explaining this accesses internal Supabase SDK API and may break on upgrades. Justified ecosystem boundary.
evidence: Line 71: (client as unknown as { rest: { fetch: typeof dataFetch } }).rest.fetch = dataFetch

findings.summary: useSegmentOutputsForShot casts Supabase view/table results through 'as unknown as RawGenerationDbRow[]'
findings.suggestion: Use Supabase's .returns<RawGenerationDbRow[]>() method to get proper type inference from the query.
evidence: Lines 258 and 354: ((data || []) as unknown as RawGenerationDbRow[]).map(transformToGenerationRow)

findings.summary: submitSegmentTask casts built params object to IndividualTravelSegmentTaskParams at the end
findings.suggestion: Build params as IndividualTravelSegmentTaskParams from the start to catch missing fields at compile time.
evidence: Line 168: return params as unknown as IndividualTravelSegmentTaskParams

findings.summary: ShotBatchItemMobile casts image through 'as unknown as Parameters<typeof fn>[0]'
findings.suggestion: Widen getImageAspectRatioStyle parameter type to accept the image's actual type, or extract needed fields explicitly.
evidence: Line 43: image as unknown as Parameters<typeof getImageAspectRatioStyle>[0]
